payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark brown stained wooden base cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and a narrow top drawer lip; matte finish with slight scuffing near the bottom edge, no visible hardware, and the door fills most of the crop (approx. 0.6 m from camera).
